author: David
context_excerpt: Hows your toolkit? Mine is now 30 years old, a mixture. Was thinking of getting a nice new set Dont see many well known brands for sale here Yeah I'm decent in that regard. I was meaning to clean it up today. In car terms one doesn't really need much. Rachet sets / socket sets , t rods , stuff like that. Dremels attachments spanner sets cutters all that. Yeah. Well u can get your milwakees and other items. But crazy expensive  Most of my stuff is collected over time. It's more to do with stuff like fasteners head shrinks stuff like that. Well thats about all i could fine Yup. That's a start. I dunno about Toyota exactly but mostly sets 10 then 11 and 12 and u can dismantle most of everything Had a decent socket set somewhere but would probably be 50 years old
